column3: LLM-based redaction before graph ingest. Limitation: LLM redaction has non-zero false negative rates; no formal guarantees. Membership inference via embeddings
column4: Embeddings are stored per-tenant in isolated database partitions. Limitation: embedding inversion attacks are an active research area. Prompt injection in Dream State
column5: Consolidation operates on stored metadata, not raw user input; safety guards (circuit breaker, published protection) limit blast radius. Metadata re-identification
column6: Topics and keywords can be identifying even without PII. Limitation: current redaction targets named entities, not topical fingerprints. Malicious artifacts via tool output
column7: Artifact pointers are stored, not artifact content; the graph never executes or parses artifact data. Credential leakage
column8: The ingest pipeline rejects known credential patterns (API keys, tokens) before summarization.
